name: collab-draft-test-app
_comment_cds: This test app is nested inside the plugin repo and is linked via 'file:../..'. It deliberately does NOT depend on @sap/cds directly: doing so installs a second @sap/cds instance under test/app/node_modules, which makes the linked plugin's cds.on('loaded') hook register on a different @sap/cds singleton than the one the CLI/app uses (dual-package hazard). The app instead resolves the plugin's @sap/cds (one directory up), so plugin + app + CLI all share a single instance and the model augmentation fires. Real npm consumers don't hit this because the plugin's @sap/cds is a peerDependency resolved from the host app.
